description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent red-tiled hip roof and a spacious, open yard. The exterior walls are primarily finished in a combination of white and black, with large windows and multiple entry points. A covered patio area opens directly onto a rectangular swimming pool, which is surrounded by a grassy lawn. The structure includes a double garage with white doors, and the main entrance is sheltered by an overhanging roof. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing natural light to various rooms. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a red-tiled hip roof, white and black exterior, large windows, a double garage, and a backyard swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered patio, large windows, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the black wall section, side entrance, and the pool adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long stretch of the building, several windows, and the continuation of the red-tiled roof.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the double garage doors, a small window, and the extended roofline.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
